headline: Skyworks Solutions and Universal Display Shares Are Falling, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks fell in the afternoon session after semiconductor stocks pulled back following a rally the previous week as geopolitical tensions between the US and China increased over artificial intelligence technology.
